hooks.command: cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE 'client-lookup\.sh|scripts/client-lookup'; then echo 'BLOCKED: scripts/client-lookup.sh is obsolete per 2026-04-20 — use DRS MCP tools: drs.client-search(field, query) -> drs.client-get(client_id), or drs.package-search(domain) for domain-only lookup. See memory/reference_client_lookup_api.md for the decision tree.' >&2; exit 2; fi; exit 0
